meta.title: ShiftGo — Log your shift, know your pay
meta.description: A shift and earnings tracker for hourly workers. Cafés, restaurants, couriers, shops, factories — see what your work is worth, clearly.

hero.title:
Log your shift.
Know your pay.
hero.subtitle: ShiftGo records your hourly or fixed-rate shifts, calculates your pay automatically, and takes the surprise out of month-end.

step1.title: Add your shift
step1.body: Start, end, break, rate. Morning, day, and evening quick templates are built in. Done in ten seconds.

step2.title: Track it live
step2.body: While your shift is running, the Home screen shows a live earnings counter. Weekly and monthly totals, all at a glance.

step3.title: Let the numbers talk
step3.body: A clean breakdown at month-end. Charts, total hours, overtime — crystal clear. Export to PDF when you need to.

1.title: Payday isn't stressful anymore
1.body: I used to dread the end of every month. This was the first month I actually knew what to expect, and it was such a relief.
1.name: Maya R.

2.title: Finally, something that just works
2.body: Simple, fast, does exactly what it says. I log my shift and that's it. Nothing extra, nothing in the way. Thank you.
2.name: Jamal T.

3.title: Every shift worker should have this
3.body: My partner can see my schedule without asking me every single day, and that alone is worth it. Our life got easier.
3.name: Sarah O.

cta.title: Try ShiftGo this month.
cta.body: Log your shift. See your pay. Calm the end of the month down.
cta.storeHint: Available on the App Store and Google Play

footer.tagline: A calm, private way to track your shifts and earnings. Built for hourly workers.
footer.contactHint: A real person reads every email. We usually reply within one working day.
